tests.title: Password login survives relaunch
tests.description: Logs in with the embedded password flow, relaunches the app without resetting state, and verifies the authenticated session is restored.

tests.title: Embedded SAML login succeeds
tests.description: Opens the embedded SAML flow, completes the mock Okta SAML handoff, and verifies the SAML user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded OIDC login succeeds
tests.description: Opens the embedded OIDC flow, completes the mock Okta OIDC handoff, and verifies the OIDC user is signed in.

tests.title: Request authorize flow signs in seeded user
tests.description: Seeds the request-authorize token, starts the authorize flow, and verifies the seeded signup user is authenticated.

tests.title: Custom SSO browser handoff returns to app
tests.description: Starts the custom SSO browser flow, completes the mock IdP handoff, and verifies the custom SSO user is signed in.

tests.title: Direct social browser handoff returns to app
tests.description: Starts the direct social browser flow, completes the mock social provider handoff, and verifies the social user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded Google social login succeeds with system web auth
tests.description: Runs the embedded Google social flow through the real system web authentication session and verifies the Google social user is signed in.

tests.title: Embedded Google OAuth error keeps login open
tests.description: Queues an OAuth error from the Google social callback, verifies the OAuth error toast is shown, and confirms the login UI stays open without authenticating the user.

tests.title: Cold launch probe timeouts do not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Queues transient startup probe timeouts and verifies the app stays on the login experience without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Post-logout relaunch transient probe failure does not blink no-connection UI
tests.description: Logs out, queues transient startup probe failures, relaunches, and verifies the app returns to the login experience without flashing the no-connection screen.

tests.title: Authenticated relaunch enters offline mode when the network path is unavailable
tests.description: Logs in, relaunches with the network path forced offline, and verifies the existing session stays available with authenticated offline indicators and no retry UI.

tests.title: Expired access token refreshes on authenticated relaunch
tests.description: Configures a short-lived access token, relaunches after expiry, and verifies the token refreshes successfully without entering offline mode.

tests.title: Offline mode recovers to online and refreshes the token
tests.description: Forces a refresh failure plus probe failures near expiry, verifies authenticated offline mode is entered, then verifies recovery back online with a refreshed token.

tests.title: Offline mode keeps the user signed in until reconnect refreshes an expired token
tests.description: Forces a prolonged offline window, lets the access token expire while offline, verifies the user stays signed in, and verifies reconnect refreshes the token successfully.

tests.title: Custom SSO recovers after a transient no-connection relaunch
tests.description: Logs out, relaunches through a transient no-connection state if it appears, then completes custom SSO and verifies the user is signed in again.

tests.title: Cold launch with offline mode disabled reaches login quickly
tests.description: Queues probe failures, launches with enableOfflineMode=false, and verifies the app reaches the login screen quickly without showing offline or no-connection UI.

tests.title: Offline mode disabled preserves session during connection loss and recovers
tests.description: Logs in with enableOfflineMode=false, terminates, queues connection drops, relaunches, verifies the session is preserved without offline indicators, then verifies the profile is restored when connection returns.

tests.title: Password login works with offline mode disabled
tests.description: Launches with enableOfflineMode=false and completes a password login, confirming normal auth flows are unaffected.

tests.title: Logout clears session so relaunch shows login
tests.description: Logs in, logs out, terminates, relaunches without reset, and verifies the login page appears (keychain cleared by logout).

tests.title: Expired refresh token clears session and shows login
tests.description: Logs in with a very short refresh token TTL, waits for both tokens to expire, relaunches, and verifies the app clears credentials and shows login.

tests.title: Scheduled token refresh fires before expiry
tests.description: Logs in with a short access token TTL and verifies the SDK's scheduled refresh fires automatically, incrementing the token version while the app stays in the foreground.

tests.title: Relaunch with expired access token refreshes via valid refresh token
tests.description: Logs in with a very short access TTL, terminates after access expires but before refresh expires, relaunches, and verifies the token is refreshed.

tests.title: Password login validates medium complexity requirements
tests.description: Attempts login with a password that fails medium complexity rules and verifies the appropriate validation error is shown.

tests.title: Password login validates hard complexity requirements
tests.description: Attempts login with a password that fails hard complexity rules and verifies the appropriate validation error is shown.

tests.title: Account locks out after incorrect password attempts
tests.description: Submits incorrect passwords repeatedly until the account is locked, then verifies the lockout message is displayed.

tests.title: Breached password shows error
tests.description: Attempts login with a known breached password and verifies the breached password error message is displayed.

tests.title: Magic code login succeeds
tests.description: Requests a magic code, enters it in the verification field, and verifies the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Magic link login succeeds
tests.description: Requests a magic link, opens the link, and verifies the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Incorrect magic code shows validation error
tests.description: Enters an incorrect magic code and verifies the validation error message is displayed.

tests.title: Expired magic code shows error
tests.description: Waits for the magic code to expire, then enters it and verifies the expiration error is shown.

tests.title: Expired magic link shows error
tests.description: Waits for the magic link to expire, then opens it and verifies the expiration error is shown.

tests.title: Resend magic code button sends a new code
tests.description: Requests a magic code, clicks the resend button, and verifies a new code is sent and can be used to authenticate.

tests.title: Password login with MFA authenticator succeeds
tests.description: Logs in with password, completes the TOTP authenticator MFA challenge, and verifies the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Password login with MFA SMS succeeds
tests.description: Logs in with password, completes the SMS MFA challenge, and verifies the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Magic code login with MFA succeeds
tests.description: Logs in with magic code, completes the MFA challenge, and verifies the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Signup with email succeeds
tests.description: Fills in the signup form with email, submits it, and verifies the account is created and the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Signup with social login succeeds
tests.description: Initiates signup via social login provider, completes the social auth flow, and verifies the account is created.

tests.title: Signup with email verification and password succeeds
tests.description: Signs up with email, verifies the email address, sets a password, and confirms the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Signup with terms checked succeeds
tests.description: Fills in the signup form, checks the terms checkbox, submits, and verifies the account is created.

tests.title: Signup with terms unchecked shows error
tests.description: Fills in the signup form without checking terms, submits, and verifies the terms validation error is displayed.

tests.title: Forgot password flow completes successfully
tests.description: Clicks forgot password, submits the email, opens the reset link, sets a new password, and verifies login with the new password.

tests.title: Password expiration warning is displayed
tests.description: Logs in with a password nearing expiration and verifies the expiration warning message is shown.

tests.title: Expired password redirects to reset page
tests.description: Logs in with an expired password and verifies the user is redirected to the password reset page.

tests.title: Magic link confirmation page loads correctly
tests.description: Opens a magic link confirmation URL in the embedded WebView and verifies the confirmation page is displayed.

tests.title: User activation page loads correctly
tests.description: Opens a user activation URL in the embedded WebView and verifies the activation page is displayed.

tests.title: New account invitation page loads correctly
tests.description: Opens an account invitation URL in the embedded WebView and verifies the invitation acceptance page is displayed.

tests.title: Unlock account page loads correctly
tests.description: Opens an unlock account URL in the embedded WebView and verifies the unlock page is displayed.

tests.title: Custom login box with password succeeds
tests.description: Uses the custom login box UI to log in with a password and verifies the user is authenticated.

tests.title: Custom login box with magic code succeeds
tests.description: Uses the custom login box UI to log in with a magic code and verifies the user is authenticated.
